button.label: About PY_RIGASSIT
button.command: from AboutToolsUI import AboutToolsUI AboutToolsUI = AboutToolsUI() AboutToolsUI.window()

button.label: PY_RIGASSIT Assistant 5
button.command: from BatchGUI import BatchGUI GUT = BatchGUI() GUT.showWindow()

button.label: Joints EditTools
button.command: from JointEdit.JointToolsUI import JointToolUI JT = JointToolUI() JT.showWindow()

button.label: Copy Tools
button.command: from CopyEdit.CopyTools import CopyToolsUI CT = CopyToolsUI() CT.showWindow()

button.label: Drive Tools
button.command: from ConstrainEdit.ConstrainToolsUI import ConstrainToolsUI COT = ConstrainToolsUI() COT.showWindow()

button.label: IKFK Ribbon System
button.command: from ControllerTool.IKFK_Ribbon_System import IKFK_Ribbon_System IKFKSYSTEM = IKFK_Ribbon_System() IKFKSYSTEM.showWindow()

button.label: Controll Tool
button.command: from ControllerTool.CustomizeCurve import CommonlyUsedSetUI CTRL = CommonlyUsedSetUI() CTRL.showWindow()

button.label: split skin weight tool
button.command: from JointEdit.split_skin_weight_UI import SplitSkinUI SST = SplitSkinUI() SST.showWindow()

button.label: Deform Weight Copy/Edit
button.command: import py_rigAssit.deform_edit.copy_deform_weight as deform_edit deform_edit.main()

button.label: Attribute Edit
button.command: from ControllerTool.AttributeEditUI import AttributeEditUI AT = AttributeEditUI() AT.showWindow()

button.label: SDK Edit
button.command: from ConstrainEdit import mirror_copy_sdk as mirror_copy_sdk mirror_copy_sdk.main()

button.label: Combine SDK Driven
button.command: import py_rigAssit.general_mod.combine_sdk_ui as combine_sdk combine_sdk.main()

button.label: Rename Tool
button.command: from GeneralTools.RenameTool import RenameBox RenameBox=RenameBox() RenameBox.showWindow()

button.label: Rivet Follice Tool
button.command: from GeneralTools.MatrixToolUI import MatrixToolsUI MXT = MatrixToolsUI() MXT.showWindow()

button.label: Transfer uv shader Tool
button.command: import py_rigAssit.model_mod.model_transfer_uv_shader as transfer_uv_shader transfer_uv_shader.main()

button.label: Animation Tool
button.command: import py_rigAssit.animation_mod.Animation_ui as Animation_ui Animation_ui.main()

button.label: RBF Dirve Pose Tool
button.command: try: from DrivePose.DriverPoseUI import DirveShapeToolsUI RBFPT = DirveShapeToolsUI() RBFPT.mainWindow() except: import HelpImageUI as Hint Hint.denyUserAccess()

button.label: Dirve Pose Tool
button.command: try: from DrivePose.direction_dirve_pose.dir_pose_ui import DIRDirveUI DIRPT = DIRDirveUI() DIRPT.mainWindow() except: import HelpImageUI as Hint Hint.denyUserAccess()

button.label: BlendShape Editor
button.command: from DrivePose.blendShape_Editor import PYBlendShapeEditor BST = PYBlendShapeEditor() BST.showWindow()

button.label: Snake Tool
button.command: import py_rigAssit.snake_tool.snake_ui as ui ui.main()

button.label: mel to python
button.command: from GeneralTools.translate_mel_to_python import TranslateMELtoPyhtonUI TranslateMELtoPyhtonUI=TranslateMELtoPyhtonUI() TranslateMELtoPyhtonUI.window()

button.label: Quick Tools box
button.command: import py_rigAssit.quick_box_ui as quick_box quick_box.show_ui()

button.label: ScriptHighlighter
button.command: import maya.mel as mel mel.eval("ScriptEditor;") import syntax_jd as syntax_jd syntax_jd.wrap()

button.label: py Openpipeline
button.command: import py_rigAssit.openpipeline.pyopenpipeline as openpipeline openpipeline.main()

button.label: Hotbox Designer
button.command: import hotbox_designer hotbox_designer.launch_manager('maya')

button.label: weightDriver
button.command: source "utilityToolKit/weightDriver/scripts/weightDriverEditRBF.mel";weightDriverEditRBF;

button.label: ngSkinTool2
button.command:
import maya.cmds as cmds if not cmds.pluginInfo('ngSkinTools2', q=True, l=True): cmds.loadPlugin('ngSkinTools2')
import ngSkinTools2 ngSkinTools2.open_ui()
